name: grpc-python-best-practices
description: Python gRPC async-first Kubernetes-native best practices using grpc.aio — server bootstrap with graceful shutdown, shared per-process channel factory, canonical decorator pattern for cross-cutting concerns, max_connection_age_* for HPA rebalancing, client-side LB via dns:/// + round_robin over a headless Service (no service mesh), ERROR_MAP + rich google.rpc.Status error model, client-side translation hierarchy
